brand.name: RC Track UAE
brand.shortDescription: The UAE's home for RC car racing, open practice, and motorsport-themed events.

footer.newsletterBody: Race nights, new arrivals, member-only deals. One email a month, never more.
footer.newsletterSuccess: You are on the list. See you at the track.
footer.newsletterError: Something went wrong. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.
footer.tagline: Built for racers, drivers, and curious first-timers.

home.metaTitle: RC Track UAE: Real Racing for Toy-Sized Cars
home.metaDescription: Race RC cars on a purpose-built track in the UAE. Trial sessions, memberships, birthday parties, academy classes, and a hobby shop.
home.heroEyebrow: The UAE's first dedicated RC racing venue
home.heroHeadline: Real racing. Smaller scale. Bigger thrill.
home.heroBody: Hands-on RC car racing on a purpose-built track for ages 7 and up. Walk in, suit up, race in 15 minutes.
home.trustHeading: Trusted by clubs, schools, and families across the UAE
home.experiencesBody: Whether it is a 30-minute trial or a school holiday camp, we have the package for it.
home.howItWorksHeading: From walk-in to winners' podium in three steps

howItWorksSteps.step1Body: Pick a slot, pay a small deposit, and arrive 10 minutes early. Walk-ins welcome when slots are open.
howItWorksSteps.step2Body: Marshals run a 5-minute safety briefing. We provide the car, controller, and helmet.
howItWorksSteps.step3Body: Hot laps, mini-grands-prix, or coached drills. We tune cars between heats so you can focus on driving.

home.newsletterBody: One email a month with race night invites, new SKUs in the shop, and member-only perks.
home.ctaBannerHeading: Ready to clock your first lap?
home.ctaBannerBody: Trial sessions run every weekend. Pick a slot now.

experiences.metaTitle: Experiences: Trial Sessions, Open Practice, Birthdays, Corporate, Schools
experiences.metaDescription: Everything you can book at RC Track UAE: trial sessions, weekly open practice, birthday parties, corporate team building, and school programmes.
experiences.title: Pick your experience
experiences.intro: From a one-time trial to a fully catered birthday or a half-day corporate offsite, we have a package designed for it.

trial.title: Trial Session
trial.body: 30 minutes on track. Car, controller, and safety gear included. No prior experience needed.

openPractice.title: Open Practice
openPractice.body: Bring your own car or rent ours. The track is yours for the hour.

birthday.title: Birthday Parties
birthday.body: Bronze, Silver, and Gold packages. Cake, podium, party room, and exclusive track time.

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.body: Team building, client offsites, conference breakouts. Up to 60 racers, full catering, branded podium.

schools.title: Schools and Camps
schools.body: STEM-aligned racing programmes, school holiday camps, and after-school clubs.

tourist.title: Visitors and Tourists
tourist.body: A 60-minute experience for visitors looking for a uniquely-Dubai memory.

trial.metaTitle: Trial Session: Try RC Racing in 30 Minutes
trial.metaDescription: Walk in, suit up, race. AED 99 introductory trial includes car, helmet, controller, and 30 minutes of guided track time.
trial.heroBody: We provide everything. You provide the smiles.
trial.safetyBody: Every session starts with a five-minute briefing. Marshals stay on track. Helmets are mandatory for under-12s on the technical layout.

openPractice.metaTitle: Open Practice: 75 AED per Hour on the City Track
openPractice.metaDescription: Open practice for licensed RC racers. Bring your own car or rent ours. Per-hour pricing.
openPractice.heroHeadline: The track is yours by the hour
openPractice.heroBody: Bring your build, rent ours, or join a class race. Members get priority bookings.
openPractice.pricing: AED 75 per hour, AED 200 for a four-hour pass.

birthday.metaTitle: Birthday Parties at the RC Track
birthday.metaDescription: Bronze, Silver, and Gold birthday packages on a purpose-built racing track. Cake, marshals, podium, and zero clean-up.
birthday.heroHeadline: The birthday they will not stop talking about
birthday.heroBody: Three packages, fully managed. Up to 18 racers, party room, podium, and the cake on cue.

gold.title: Gold
items: Three marshals and a race commentator
Cake setup, podium ceremony, and full reel of photos

corporate.metaDescription: Adrenaline-fuelled team building for groups of 8 to 60. Full catering, branded podium, executive lounge.
corporate.heroHeadline: Team building with shoulders on the wheel
corporate.heroBody: From a 90-minute lunchtime grand prix to a full-day offsite, our corporate packages keep teams together and engaged.

schools.metaDescription: STEM-aligned racing programmes, after-school clubs, and full-week holiday camps. Curriculum-mapped, marshal-supervised.
schools.heroHeadline: Where physics meets the chequered flag
schools.heroBody: Curriculum-mapped programmes for years 3 to 12. After-school clubs, week-long holiday camps, and bespoke STEAM field trips.

academy.metaDescription: Six-week academy terms for kids and adults. Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced cohorts. Coached by ex-club champions.
academy.heroHeadline: From first lap to podium finish
academy.heroBody: Six-week academy terms across three skill levels. Race craft, setup, line theory, and tactics.

tourist.metaTitle: For Visitors and Tourists in the UAE
tourist.metaDescription: 60-minute RC racing experience tailored to visitors. Photo reel, certificate, and a podium photo to take home.
tourist.heroBody: 60 minutes on track, photo reel, certificate, and a podium photo to take home. Free hotel pickup on bookings over AED 600.

tracks.metaDescription: Two purpose-built RC racing tracks in the UAE. The technical City layout and the high-speed Village layout.
tracks.title: Two tracks. One pit lane.
tracks.intro: Our City layout favours technical drivers. The Village layout is a flat-out speed test.

city.title: City Track
city.layout: Tight infield with two hairpins and an off-camber sweeper.

village.title: Village Track
village.tagline: Long straights. Big jumps. Throttle pinned.
village.layout: Two long straights, a triple-jump, and a wide carousel.

memberships.metaDescription: Annual memberships for the RC Track UAE. Priority bookings, discounts in the shop, and members-only race nights.
memberships.title: Memberships
memberships.intro: Race more. Pay less. Three tiers, billed annually, cancel any time.

silverFeatures: Bring a guest twice a year

memberships.joinIntro: A 60-second sign-up. After you submit, you will be redirected to Stripe to complete the annual payment.
memberships.joinSuccess: Welcome aboard. Check your inbox for next steps.

shop.metaTitle: Hobby Shop: Cars, Parts, Tyres, and Tools
shop.metaDescription: 1:10 and 1:8 RC cars, batteries, motors, ESCs, tyres, and pit tools. Tabby and Tamara accepted.
shop.title: Hobby shop
shop.intro: Race-prepared cars, spares, and the tools to keep them on the limit.
shop.tabbyNote: Pay in 4 with Tabby. Interest free.

wishlist.metaDescription: Save products to your wishlist. Stored locally on your device.
wishlist.title: Your wishlist

events.metaDescription: Open race nights, member championships, manufacturer demo days, and one-off festivals.
events.title: Events at the track
events.intro: Open race nights, member championships, manufacturer demo days, and the odd one-off festival.

blog.metaTitle: Pit Lane Stories: News, Tips, and Race Reports
blog.metaDescription: RC racing tutorials, race reports, member profiles, and gear reviews from the UAE's home of RC.
blog.title: Pit lane stories
blog.intro: Tutorials, race reports, member profiles, and gear reviews.

gallery.metaDescription: Photos and reels from race nights, birthday parties, corporate days, and academy graduations.
gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.intro: Photos and reels from race nights, birthdays, corporate days, and academy graduations.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to common questions about booking, pricing, age requirements, parking, and accessibility.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Cannot find what you need? Message us on WhatsApp.

contact.metaDescription: Talk to us by WhatsApp, email, or our quote form. We reply within four hours during venue hours.
contact.title: Talk to us
contact.intro: WhatsApp is fastest. Forms also work. We reply within four hours during venue hours.
contact.whatsappBody: Fastest path to a marshal. Tap to open chat.
contact.phoneBody: Call us during venue hours (10 AM to 11 PM).

press.metaDescription: Press releases, brand kit, photography, and interview requests.
press.title: Press and media
press.intro: Releases, brand kit, photography, and interview requests.

careers.metaDescription: Marshals, instructors, mechanics, and event managers. Open roles updated weekly.
careers.title: Build the track with us
careers.intro: Marshals, instructors, mechanics, and event managers.

members.metaDescription: Member-only features are launching soon. Sign up to be notified.
members.title: Members area coming soon
members.body: Lap-time leaderboards, member-only race nights, and a track-side messaging board are on the build. Drop your email and we will tell you the day it goes live.

about.metaDescription: Built by RC racers for RC racers. Our story, our values, and the team behind the track.
about.title: Built by racers, for racers
about.intro: Our founder grew up bashing 1:10 buggies in Sharjah back when finding a parts shop meant a trip to Bangkok. We built RC Track UAE so the next generation does not have to wait.

values.safetyBody: Marshals on every heat, certified gear, and a five-minute briefing before every session.
values.communityBody: Member nights, school clubs, and a welcoming pit lane. Beginners are heroes here.
values.performanceBody: Race-grade timing, transponder loops, and a championship calendar that runs all year.

booking.metaDescription: Pick a slot, pay a small deposit, and turn up. Walk-ins welcome when slots are open.
booking.title: Book your slot
booking.intro: Pick a service, pick a time, pay a small deposit. Pay the balance at the venue.

confirmed.title: You are on the grid
confirmed.body: We sent the details to your email and WhatsApp. Arrive ten minutes early for the safety briefing. Pit lane is on the left as you walk in.

orders.title: Track your order
orders.body: We send tracking links by email and SMS as soon as your order ships. If you cannot find yours, message us on WhatsApp and quote your order number.

cookies.title: Cookie preferences
cookies.body: We respect the UAE PDPL. Choose which cookies you allow. You can change this any time from the footer.
cookies.necessaryBody: Required for the site to function. Always on.
cookies.analyticsBody: Helps us understand which pages convert and which need work.
cookies.marketingBody: Lets us measure ad performance and re-engage interested visitors.
cookies.personalisationBody: Remembers your preferences for a smoother visit.

whatsapp.tooltip: We reply within four hours during venue hours
whatsapp.messageDefault: Hi RC Track UAE, I would like to know more about your services.
whatsapp.messageBookTrial: Hi RC Track UAE, I would like to book a trial session.
whatsapp.messageBirthday: Hi RC Track UAE, I would like a quote for a birthday party.
whatsapp.messageCorporate: Hi RC Track UAE, I am organising a corporate event.
whatsapp.messageSchool: Hi RC Track UAE, I am from a school and would like a programme quote.
whatsapp.messageProduct: Hi RC Track UAE, I have a question about this product: {productName}.
whatsapp.messageMember: Hi RC Track UAE, I am a {tier} member and need help with my booking.

fields.name: Full name
fields.consent: I agree to be contacted about my booking
fields.marketingConsent: Send me race-night invites and member-only offers

errors.name: Please enter your full name.
errors.consent: We can only proceed with your consent.

forms.submitSuccess: Thanks. We will be in touch.
forms.submitError: Something went wrong. Try WhatsApp or email.

errors.notFoundBody: The link you followed has retired. Find what you need from our home page.
errors.globalBody: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified.
